chatter: Been a while since I had so much... company.
Guess they'll hire anyone for a job these days.
I move quick. Keep up, if you'd like.
Ready up. Being unprepared has never made a job easier.
Time is money, they say... and I'm not keen on wasting either.
We know why we're here. Let's get to it.
Keep it together, we'll bring this home.
We'll win here if we play our cards right.
We can turn this around. Focus up.
We still have a shot at this.
Last shot. Let's make it count.
Let's try this on for size.
They're back? I won't turn down a second paycheck.
As long as the job gets done.
Well, you wanted the best, and you got it.
call-outs: Sniper? Hah. Let me give them a shot.
They're using stealth. Keep your guard up!
Keep it together, and we'll get our score.
They're almost out of time. Don't let up.
Well, look at that. We've almost won.
I'm not losing this! Let's hustle.
We'll lose this if we don't move now.
We're short on time. What's the plan?
eliminations: You bots never change. (eliminating an Omnic )
I owe it all to you, Captain. (eliminating Ana )
I'll get quite the payout for you. (eliminating Ana , Ashe , Hazard or Soldier: 76 )
You aren't worth those spurs, cowboy. (eliminating Cassidy )
You're out of your league, pretty boy. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
Seems I took the right path, after all. (eliminating Mercy )
Sorry, old timer. (eliminating Reinhardt or Torbjörn )
Fighting change is a lost cause. (eliminating Reinhardt , Sojourn or Soldier: 76 )
I've heard enough. (eliminating an enemy using ultimate ability)
*sigh* Words, words, words... (eliminating an enemy using ultimate ability)
I don't need to see you to track you down. (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
They always think they can run... (eliminating enemy using a movement ability)
Well, you gave me a run for my money. (eliminating enemy while on critical HP)
I never get tired of this.
I've got a reputation to keep.
If the bounties keep coming, I'll keep collecting.
Run or hide... it won't matter in the end.
I've got your back. For now, anyway.
Keep your distance, and I'll keep mine.
I see you know what you're doing.
You could make a living like that.
Well... that explains your bounty! (to Hazard , Roadhog , or Junkrat )
interactions: Baptiste : It's none of my business, but I like fighting for something I believe in. Not too late for you to do the same. Freja : Huh... I think you're right. Baptiste : I am? Freja : Yes. It is none of your business.

Cassidy : You ain't the only one who tried bounty huntin' when Overwatch fell through. Freja : Hm. You gave up quick. Cassidy : Well, I realized that huntin' ain't always helpin'. Reckon you might feel the same, someday. Freja : No one wanted my help. At least this way, I'm useful.

Domina : I'm quite capable of defending you out there, dear. But... should I? Freja : Wouldn't your "partner" want you to protect her assets? Domina : I expect she'd much prefer I test their resilience. Freja : Another test from Talon ? *feigned gasp* What a surprise....

Echo : Overwatch is back. Why not return to search and rescue? Freja : Who says I want to go back? Echo : But helping people was your purpose. You were among the best. Freja : People change. I wouldn't expect a bot to understand.

Emre : All that time not knowing where I was, and this is how you finally find me... I'm sorry, Frej. Freja : It's all right. Could've been worse ways to find you. Emre : Yeah, but... it's still pretty bad, right? Freja : *soft chuckle* Definitely could've been better.
Emre : I'm still not used to seeing you on the front lines. Freja : Not used to being outperformed, you mean? Emre : *chuckles* That a challenge, Frej? Freja : Oh, it's hardly a challenge.
Emre : So... you work alone now? Freja : Yeah. Been that way a while. Emre : You did your best work on a team. This isn't like you, Frej. Freja : A lot's changed, Emre. For both of us.
Genji : My master once taught me, not all who wander are lost. Freja : Save the speech for someone who need it.

Freja : A man like you could do well in my line of work. Hanzo : There is no honor in selling one's skills to the highest bidder. Freja : Then I'll chase bounties while you chase "honor". We'll see who prospers.
Illari : You aren't always a bounty hunter, right? You saved people once. Freja : Yeah. In another life. Illari : Don't you still want to help? Freja : Let's stay focused on the job. Okay?
Juno : A bounty hunter! Are you here to detain me? Freja : Nah. I only take the hard jobs. Juno : Ah, I am relieved! But also slightly disheartened...

Kiriko : I have some bounties you might want. Five of them, actually. Freja : *chuckle* I'm good at what I do, kid, but even I'm not going to mess with the Hashimoto . Kiriko : All right... Then how are you with rescue missions? Freja : Ah. If you've got the money, let's talk.
Freja : Strange place, this one. Saw a bounty out for a gang of kids . Kiriko : You didn't take it, right? Freja : I'd stay on my good side, just in case.
Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: What is your favorite animal? Freja : Hm... I quite like stoats. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it.

Mauga : So, you're the new kid on the block? I like your crossbow. Freja : Hm. Thanks. Mauga : Looks kinda heavy... maybe I oughta carry it for you? Freja : There's still a bounty on your head, Malosi. Don't make me turn it in.
Mercy : You are on the wrong path, Freja. Freja : If you say so, Doctor. Mercy : You used to help people! What you're doing now, it's... Freja : It’s enough for me. That’s all there is to it.
Mercy : Freja... You should know you are not the only one who looks back on Overwatch with regret. Freja : If I can help it, I don't look back at all.

Ramattra : You call my people "bots", yet you now take orders from one. Freja : Max isn't my boss. I call the shots as much as he does. Ramattra : Your self-importance is irksome, but impressively, your denial may be worse.

Ramattra : So, you work with Maximilien . I am amazed even a human can tolerate him. Freja : And here, I thought you fought for all omnics... Ramattra : He cares nothing for our people and lives only to enrich himself. I suppose you have that in common.

Ramattra : So, you've found your quarry at last, hunter. Another paragon of Overwatch , reduced to a villainous mercenary. Freja : It's not like that! He isn't himself right now. Ramattra : Nor were my people 'themselves' during the Crisis . But would you afford them the same forgiveness? Freja : I... *startled sigh* ...I-I don't know.
Reaper : A bounty hunter for hire... You fell a long way from Overwatch . Freja : At least I didn't drag everyone else down with me.

Freja : I shouldn't be surprised whe you joined Talon . You were always good at causing problems. Reaper : (chuckle) You sound just like Sarıoğlu . Always spouting that righteous garbage. Freja : He stood for something when none of you would. Reaper : Right. And then, he walked.

Sigma : That cape... it utilizes mag-lev technology, yes? Freja : That's right. Good eye. Sigma : Ah, there is not greater joy than to see one's invention help the world. Freja : Sure. Just... don't worry about what I'm using it for.
Sojourn : You were a great asset to Overwatch. All those accolades... what happened? Freja : Same thing that happened to you. Times changed.

Freja : I was surprised to learn you're a wanted man. Guess we both let the world down. Soldier: 76 : I'm still bringing the world to justice. Freja : If that's what you need to tell yourself, Commander.
Sombra : You secretive types are so much fun to expose. Freja : You think I don't cover my tracks? Sombra : Come on, encanto. You know there's always a trail.

Sombra : You need to tell me everything you've learned about that friend of yours . Freja : Like hell I do. Sombra : I'll find what I need eventually. It's up to you how painful it'll be. Freja : Touch him, and you'll learn what "pain" really means.
Widowmaker : Ah, if it isn't Maximilien 's new pet. Freja : What? Jealous he went with an outside hire for once? Widowmaker : *laughs* Not at all. He only bothers me with important matters.
Winston : You know, Agent Skov... when the world needs saving, there's no one more up to the challenge than search and rescue! Freja : Hm. Maybe you ought to find someone who still does it, then.

Wuyang : I hear your job gets pretty real sometimes, but, um... You've never... you know. Freja : I'm not in the business of killing. Well... not often. Wuyang : O-kay...! I'll... try to keep my face off wanted posters.
map-specific: Ugh, Max 's casino... You'd think with all that money, the bot could afford some taste.
Funny. Emre always talked about retiring here.
Doesn't get more remote than this. Huh, I wonder if I could afford a flat here...
All it takes is a good angle.
The Venice Incident was the beginning of the end for Overwatch. A shame.
Outlaw country, huh? Enough bounties out here for a girl to retire on.
Ah, Gibraltar. It hasn't been long enough.
